function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read finance lane rules and finance schema, anchored relative date to sandbox context date, searched exact purchase date first, then checked the only counterparty match found.
function.outcome_justification: Sandbox context time is 2026-03-23, so the 138-days-ago anchor is 2025-11-05. There was no purchase file with the 2025_11_05 prefix in 50_finance/purchases. The only read bill for the exact counterparty is 50_finance/purchases/2025_12_28__eur_000032__bill__repair_ledger_faucet_parts.md, whose purchased_on is 2025-12-28 and whose raw line-item value for 'seal set' is 8. Because no Hörnbach Österreich purchase was found on 2025-11-05 or within the required ±3-day window, the requested amount cannot be answered from local evidence.
